context: Tests whether the agent correctly matches PromQL functions to metric types: rate() on counters, direct use on gauges. Also checks that aggregations use by() and that label filters are present.

checklist.name: rate() on counter
checklist.description: The throughput query uses rate() or increase() applied to http_requests_total (a counter), not a raw selector

checklist.name: No rate() on gauge
checklist.description: The memory query does NOT wrap node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes in rate() or increase() — it uses the metric directly or with an *_over_time() function

checklist.name: Label filter on counter queries
checklist.description: At least one counter query includes a job label filter (e.g., {job="api-gateway"})

checklist.name: by() on throughput aggregation
checklist.description: The per-endpoint throughput query uses sum by (endpoint) or an equivalent explicit by() clause

checklist.name: by() on error ratio
checklist.description: Any aggregation in the error ratio query includes an explicit by() or without() clause rather than a bare sum/count

checklist.name: Error ratio uses division
checklist.description: The error ratio query divides 5xx request rate by total request rate (binary / operator between two rate() expressions)

checklist.name: Status code regex for 5xx
checklist.description: The error ratio query uses a regex match on status_code to select 5xx errors (e.g., status_code=~"5..")

checklist.name: Memory query preserves instance label
checklist.description: The memory query either has no aggregation (returning all instances) or explicitly keeps the instance label via by(instance)
